purpose_string: Replace the failed v13 sparse temporal binding with one immutable lossless browser-rendered 49-frame interval guide, while keeping the exact canonical horse, camera, prompt family, seed, model, loop dimensions and post-sampling crop contract.

predecessor_experiment_object.result_string: V13 made all nine sparse guides hard but still repeated the frame-18 fore-left lift at recovery frame 12 and lost distal chains at frames 36 and 48. V14 supplies every browser-authored frame as one continuous lossless video guide so temporal order is represented between all former anchors.

positive_prompt_string: Locked-camera inverse skeletal fitting reference of the exact canonical actionless horse and camera. Treat the supplied browser Three.js interval video as one mandatory exact 49-frame temporal guide, never as a loose style example, sparse keyframe set or optional reference. Preserve its exact temporal order: hind-left only during frames 1-11 with apex frame 6; all four hooves planted at recovery frame 12; fore-left only during frames 13-23 with apex frame 18; all four hooves planted at recovery frame 24; hind-right only during frames 25-35 with apex frame 30; all four hooves planted at recovery frame 36; fore-right only during frames 37-47 with apex frame 42; and the exact planted endpoint at frame 48. At most one hoof is in swing at any frame and at least three hooves remain planted, with no flight or suspension frame. Every leg, including each fetlock-pastern-hoof distal chain, remains one opaque connected fixed-length anatomical chain in every frame. Preserve one identical horse, geometry, proportions, materials, four persistent legs, background, exposure and fixed camera, and return to the exact object-region endpoint without a seam pause or net translation.
negative_prompt_string: ignored video guide, optional video guide, sparse guide interpretation, guide frame reordering, repeated prior swing at recovery, shifted guide timing, suppressed swing apex, missing swing apex, recovery anchor drift, early next swing, late previous touchdown, camera movement, crop, zoom, scene cut, background change, background fade, ground disappearance, exposure drift, lighting flicker, duplicate horse, identity change, extra limb, missing limb, ghost limb, ghost hoof, ghost distal segment, faded limb, disappearing limb, detached limb, detached hoof, detached distal segment, wavy limb, transparent limb, translucent limb, broken silhouette, length snap, segment-length snap, stretched distal chain, compressed distal chain, paired hoof swing, overlapping hoof swing, crossing recovery barrier, foot sliding, hoof skating, diagonal pair, lateral pair, trot, pace, hop, bound, gallop, flight phase, suspension phase, fewer than three planted hooves, ground penetration, broken joint, rubber limb, curled distal limb, hoof morphing, material change, endpoint freeze, seam pause, object-region endpoint drift, text, watermark
controlled_variable_string: Replace the v13 chain of nine hard sparse PNG LTXVAddGuide nodes with one lossless 49-frame browser interval video loaded through LoadVideo and GetVideoComponents into one strength-1.0 LTXVAddGuide node at frame 0.
fixed_factors_array: same immutable actionless Horse model and camera provenance
same pinned LTX 19B FP8 checkpoint and static-camera LoRA
same browser-authored poses at former frames 0 6 12 18 24 30 36 42 48
one official LTXVAddGuide node with post-sampling LTXVCropGuides
no Blender and no unavailable control model
manual_acceptance_gates_array: the raw experiment JSON SHA-256 equals its code-owned v14 pin before reference or guide bundle access
the immutable interval manifest and MKV match their code-owned SHA-256 and byte-size pins
the guide is exactly 49 lossless RGB frames at 768x448 and 30 fps with no audio
the patched graph contains exactly one each LoadVideo GetVideoComponents ResizeImageMaskNode LTXVPreprocess LTXVAddGuide and LTXVCropGuides
the single LTXVAddGuide uses frame_idx 0 and exact strength 1.0
the graph retains exactly seven base plus seven guide temporal latent slices for a total of fourteen
manual visual review and the hardened object-region video gate pass before browser fitting
TAPNext gait QA orderAccepted and overlapAccepted are both true with no flight frame
candidate remains generated_not_approved until browser fitting hoof-contact and fixed-camera visual QA pass

generation_authorization_object.required_next_action_string: Runtime authorization must exactly match this immutable v14 experiment id and raw spec SHA-256.
